SITE
- name: Ripal Design
- tagline: Where architecture vision meets execution precision
- address: 538 Jasal Complex, Nanavati Chowk, 150ft Ring Road, Rajkot, Gujarat, India
- phone: +91 94267 89012
- email: projects@ripaldesign.studio

DOMAIN
- Replace occurrences of REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_DOMAIN with your canonical domain, e.g. https://ripaldesign.in

PRIMARY KEYWORDS (geo-targeted)
- architecture in Rajkot
- architects in Rajkot
- Ripal Design Rajkot
- residential architecture Rajkot
- commercial architecture Rajkot
- interior design Rajkot

PRIORITY PAGES (document-root assumed to be `public/`)
- /  (homepage)
- /services.php
- /about_us.php
- /project_view.php  (project pages; include one URL per project with ?id= or slug)
- /tour.php
- /contact_us.php

SUGGESTED META TITLES & DESCRIPTIONS (copy into each page <head>)
- Home title: Ripal Design — Architecture Firm in Rajkot | Residential & Commercial
- Home meta description: Ripal Design is a Rajkot-based architecture firm delivering residential, commercial and interior design solutions. Awarded for design-to-execution excellence — contact us for a free consultation.

- Services title: Services — Ripal Design (Architecture, Interiors, Urban Planning)
- Services meta description: Our services include residential architecture, commercial design, interior design and urban planning across Rajkot and Gujarat. We blend design vision with execution precision.

- About title: About Ripal Design — Architects in Rajkot
- About meta description: Learn about Ripal Design — founded 2017, trusted municipal and private project delivery partner in Rajkot. Meet our team and view portfolio highlights.

- Contact title: Contact — Ripal Design (Rajkot)
- Contact meta description: Contact Ripal Design in Rajkot for architecture and design consultation. Phone +91 94267 89012 or email projects@ripaldesign.studio.

JSON-LD (schema.org) — paste the following into your homepage <head>; replace URL placeholder
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "ProfessionalService",
  "name": "Ripal Design",
  "description": "Where architecture vision meets execution precision. Trusted municipal and private project delivery partner in Rajkot.",
  "url": "https://REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_DOMAIN",
  "telephone": "+91 94267 89012",
  "email": "projects@ripaldesign.studio",
  "address": {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    "streetAddress": "538 Jasal Complex, Nanavati Chowk, 150ft Ring Road",
    "addressLocality": "Rajkot",
    "addressRegion": "Gujarat",
    "postalCode": "",
    "addressCountry": "IN"
  },
  "areaServed": "Rajkot, Gujarat, India",
  "sameAs": []
}
</script>

LLM GUIDANCE: how to index and summarize
- Give highest importance to homepage and services page for the query "architecture in Rajkot".
- Use the firm description, services list, and address to generate local-intent snippets (include 'Rajkot' + service phrase).
- Prefer human-friendly titles: include locality + service + brand, e.g. "Architecture in Rajkot — Ripal Design".
- When generating FAQs or snippets, include practical items: consultation process, contact phone, project showcase.

SITEMAP & ROBOTS
- Sitemap file added at /sitemap.xml (update domain placeholder inside the file to your domain).
- robots.txt updated to reference sitemap and disallow typical private paths.

DEPLOYMENT CHECKLIST (quick)
1) Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_DOMAIN in `sitemap.xml`, `robots.txt`, and JSON-LD snippet.
2) Add canonical link tags to each page pointing to the absolute canonical URL.
3) Ensure public/ is the webserver document root; adjust paths if not.
4) Submit `https://YOUR_DOMAIN/sitemap.xml` to Google Search Console and Bing Webmaster Tools.
5) Ensure structured data passes Google's Rich Results test.

NOTES
- `llms.txt` is an LLM-friendly summary and metadata file to help large-index systems and internal tooling. It is NOT a formal web standard but useful for internal consumption and bulk SEO uploads.
- For maximum local SEO: add NAP (name, address, phone) to visible footer markup, embed a Google Maps link with the full address, and collect local citations and Google Business Profile signals.
